title: A comprehensive analysis of humanized mouse models for the study of cancer immunotherapies
authors: De La Rochere P, Loumagne L, Rathaux M, et al.
abstract: Humanized immune system (HIS) mouse models engrafted with human hematopoietic cells and tumors recapitulate key aspects of human immune-tumor crosstalk. This study comprehensively compares Hu-CD34+ and Hu-PBMC models, assessing engraftment kinetics, GVHD, host strain effects, and responses to T-cell-directed therapies including anti-PD1, IL-2 complexes, and T-cell engagers.
